title: Daresbury Data Conference
content:
- [[Health]] [[Space]] and [[Digital]] tech clusters cross cluster conference.
- Future of Data for the UK economy
- Collect, store, use challenges.
- Quantum ML gives a 20% optimisation for inferencing on problems like drug discovery.
- There is a need to set global standards for metadata
- How we do compute / the split between bits and qbits is going to be crucial, it's closer than we think
- Data to address global challenges
- CHIL civic health innovation lab. Using civic data
  - population health
  - mental health
  - clinical system resilience
- Data visualisation
